project.component: { "keyToString": { "Attach to Unity Editor.Attach to Unity Editor & Play.executor": "Debug", "Attach to Unity Editor.Attach to Unity Editor.executor": "Debug", "Attach to Unity Player.Unity.exe (Player 2).executor": "Debug", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "Standalone Player.Standalone Player.executor": "Debug", "Unity Attach to Device.Attach to Device.executor": "Debug", "git-widget-placeholder": "ZircliX", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.sourceCode.C#", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

item.itemvalue: Attach to Unity Editor.Attach to Unity Editor & Play
Attach to Unity Editor.Attach to Unity Editor
